Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "SCUBADIVE-2700" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Scuba Dive.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to default to joystick control: 1. Patched the JMP $2880 instruction at $27E2 to be JMP $28F1 instead - this runs the code which normally gets executed when J is pressed on the menu screen 2. Patched the JMP $28B4 instruction at $28C6 to be JMP $0900 instead 3. Added a small routine at $0900 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $C5 to $29, which causes the game to start when on the menu screen, just as if P was pressed. The routine then jumps to $28B4 to carry on the normal code flow. 4. Also patched the menu screen to make it clear that either P or fire button can be used to start the game
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
